ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feature belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., wall, window, door) */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the feature (e.g., building, bridge) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., structural, architectural) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the feature */,
  "family_and_type" TEXT /* Combination of family and type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature family */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES feature_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the material belongs to */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the material */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the permission belongs to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access of the user for the project */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access of the user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the log entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the feature (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES project_teams ("team_id")
)
